response.original_title: しょうがいきょうかつ ぜんかじゅうさんぱん
response.overview: Mineoka Group executive Okitsu Seiji is imprisoned for the 13th time for attacking rival Kuronuma. While in prison, he learns that the Kuronuma Group has retaliated by killing its leader and seizing territory. Upon his release, he embarks on a revenge campaign.
response.title: しょうがいきょうかつ ぜんかじゅうさんぱん
